message:
feat(tests): implement invariant checking functions [bd-16tb]

Add comprehensive invariant checking for region tree property tests:

- InvariantViolation type for reporting violations
- check_all_invariants() aggregates all checks
- assert_all_invariants() panics with details on violation
- Individual checks:
  1. No orphan tasks (task.owner references valid region)
  2. Valid tree structure (single root, no cycles)
  3. Child tracking consistency (parent-child bidirectional)
  4. Unique IDs (no duplicate region/task IDs)
  5. Cancel propagation (cancelled parent → cancelled children)
  6. Close ordering (parent not closed until children closed)

Property tests now validate invariants after each operation and under
stress (50-100 random operations). All 13 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
